title: User
description: Represents an itch.io account with basic profile information.

id.description: Site-wide unique identifier generated by itch.io

username.description: The user's username, used for login and profile URLs

displayName.description: The user's display name; human-friendly, may contain spaces and unicode

developer.description: Whether the user has opted into creating games

pressUser.description: Whether the user is part of itch.io's press program

url.description: The address of the user's page on itch.io

coverUrl.description: User's avatar URL; may be a GIF

stillCoverUrl.description: Static version of user's avatar; only set if coverUrl is a GIF
